actions.title: Prepare Local Bus Network for Broadway Subway
actions.description: Bus route changes to integrate with the Broadway Subway extension of the Millennium Line. Routes restructured to feed into new stations.

actions.title: Further Integrate Buses with Broadway Subway
actions.description: Additional route changes to reduce duplication and improve connections between buses and the new subway stations along Broadway.

actions.title: Support R2 Extension to Metrotown
actions.description: Bus network changes to support the extension of the R2 Marine Drive RapidBus from River District to Metrotown Station.

actions.title: Bus Network Changes in South Vancouver
actions.description: Route modifications in south Vancouver to improve directness and connections, including new Route J.

actions.title: Bus Network Changes — Renfrew/Collingwood/SE Vancouver
actions.description: Changes to improve service in east Vancouver including new routes A and I, modifications to routes 20, 26, 29, 31, and removal of 222.

actions.title: Integrate with Burnaby Mountain Gondola
actions.description: Restructure bus routes serving SFU to integrate with the proposed Burnaby Mountain Gondola.

actions.title: Integrate with Millennium Line UBC Extension
actions.description: Future bus restructuring to integrate with SkyTrain extension to UBC. Route 84 would be removed.

actions.title: Bus Network Changes — Burnaby/New Westminster
actions.description: Route modifications in Burnaby and New Westminster to improve efficiency and connections.

actions.title: Downtown Vancouver Bus Changes
actions.description: Changes to routes serving downtown Vancouver including modifications to routes 19, 23, 17, and new route C.

actions.title: Southeast Burnaby Changes
actions.description: New route D to serve southeast Burnaby and improve connections to SkyTrain stations.

actions.title: Southwest Burnaby Changes
actions.description: New routes E, F, and K to serve southwest Burnaby areas.

actions.title: Stanley Park Route
actions.description: New route G providing seasonal shuttle service to Stanley Park.

actions.title: North Shore Bus Improvements
actions.description: New route H and changes to routes serving North Vancouver via Second Narrows, including proposed removal of 209.

actions.title: Future Downtown Exchange Integration
actions.description: Reorganize downtown bus routing when new exchanges are built at Stadium-Chinatown and Waterfront stations.

actions.title: Increase Service Frequency
actions.description: Focus on increasing frequency on routes that are overcrowded, serve equity-deserving areas, or don't meet Frequent Transit Network standards.

actions.title: Implement Transit Priority Infrastructure
actions.description: 31 priority corridors in 3 tiers for bus lanes, signal priority, and queue jump measures.

actions.title: New Limited-Stop Overlay Routes
actions.description: 10 new limited-stop routes providing faster service on high-ridership corridors.
